LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SUBMIT ANY SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENTS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NO BAD FAITH CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT OR THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT SUE BOTH THE ALLEGEDLY NEGLIGENT DEFENDANTS AND THEIR INSURER IN THE SAME ACTION. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). MS. LEE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-19-2011 CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT GAMEZ, AURA

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-24-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Jose Torres and Aura Gamez appearing on their own behalf. No appearance, nor objection filed by Plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Continued To May-24-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff and Self-represented Defendants are sanctioned $250.00 each for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/24/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
